text: Welcome back everyone today we are talking about the weirdest business failure I have ever seen.
The founder looked me in the eye and said would you invest if I told you the product catches fire.
Everybody laughed and then he admitted three customers had already returned it because it exploded in testing.
The shocking part is that a major brand still offered a partnership after the clip went viral.
So the real lesson is that controversy creates attention but bad operations kill the company.
